series_metadata.series_description: Information concerning complaints filed by licensees and the public regarding radon testing and mitigation, test resulsts, provate residence info (I.e. names, addresses and phone numbers), contractor names and addresses.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years after expiration of license in office then transfer to Records Retention for 3 years then destroy, provided that no legal action pending, Paper: Shred
